sutta: once the exalted 1 dwelt near vaisali at the gabled hall in mahavana and there general siha paid him a visit saluted him and sat down at 1 side so seated the general said to the exalted 1 is it possible lord to show the visible result of giving it is possible sihan said the exalted 1 the arms giver siha the charitable man is good and dear to many folk since it is so siha this is the visible result of giving again the good and wise follow him since they do so see her this is the visible result of giving again a good report concerning him goes about since such occurs see her this is the visible result of giving again whatever company he enters be it nobles brahmins householders or recluses he enters with confidence and untroubled since he does so see her this is the visible result of giving again the arms giver the charitable man on the breaking up of the body after death is reborn in the happy heaven world since that is so siha it is hereafter the result of giving when he had thus spoken general siha said to the exalted 1 lord those 4 visible results of giving declared by the exalted 1 not as to them go i by faith in the exalted 1 i just know the those things lord i am a giver a liberal man am good and dear to many folk many good and wise men follow me a good report concerning me goes about people say general siha is an arms giver a worker and a servant of the sangha whatever company of nobles and so forth i enter i do so with confidence and untroubled i do not go by faith in the exalted 1's words in regard to these things i just know them but when the exalted 1 says to me see her a giver a liberal man on the breaking up of the body after death is reborn in the happy heaven world it is this that i do not know and it is herein that i go by faith in the exalted 1's words it is even so siha it is verily just as you say said the buddha that's the end of the suta
commentary: so here there are several advantages of of being a charitable man first a charitable man is good is good and dear to many people secondly the good and wise people follow him thirdly he has a good reputation people to say good words about him and the fourthly whatever company he joins he joins them with confidence and the fifth 1 is that after death is reborn into the heaven world but probably you can add another 1 is that when a person is about to pass away a person who has been a charitable man he's got a lot of merit to boost him up so he has confidence whereas a person who has not done much good deeds and has not accumulated much married at the time of death that person is very scared doesn't have enough merit and blessings to support him now another
